name: ClawKeeper
description: ClawKeeper: run OpenClaw inside OpenShell with optional NIM-backed inference

blueprintVersion.description: Pinned blueprint artifact version (e.g., '0.1.0'). Omit for latest.

blueprintRegistry.description: OCI registry or GitHub release URL for blueprint artifacts

sandboxName.description: Name for the OpenClaw sandbox in OpenShell

inferenceProvider.description: Default inference provider type (nvidia, vllm, openai-compatible)

security.description: Semantic security controls for hook-based action arbitration

policyPath.description: Path to security-policy.yaml (relative to plugin root or absolute path)

approvalTimeoutMs.description: Maximum wait for approval-mediated decisions in milliseconds

scanTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for install-time external scanner calls

alertWebhook.description: Optional webhook endpoint for security alert delivery

quota.description: Runtime quota guardrails used by the security engine
